abstract: The object you use in image components for displaying captions when the image is full-screen.
overview:
## Discussion

Use a `CaptionDescriptor` object to provide a caption or attribution for an image that’s displayed full screen. You can use a caption descriptor with a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Figure], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], or [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo] component, and also with the individual items in a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Gallery] or [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Mosaic] component.

You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Figure], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo], and [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/Apple_News_Format_Ref/GalleryItem.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015408-CH63].

### Example
rawMarkdown: --- source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/CaptionDescriptor crawled: 2026-03-10T14:19:11Z --- # CaptionDescriptor **Object** The object you use in image components for displaying captions when the image is full-screen. ## Declaration ```swift object CaptionDescriptor ``` ## Discussion Use a `CaptionDescriptor` object to provide a caption or attribution for an image that’s displayed full screen. You can use a caption descriptor with a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Figure], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], or [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo] component, and also with the individual items in a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Gallery] or [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Mosaic] component. You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Figure], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo], and [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/Apple_News_Format_Ref/GalleryItem.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015408-CH63]. ### Example ```json { "components": [ { "role": "gallery", "items": [ { "URL": "bundle://gallery-01.jpg", "caption": "Thanks to the record drought, mountain lions have begun to descend from the peaks, sometimes into urban settings." }, { "URL": "bundle://gallery-02.jpg", "caption": "Coyotes are also seen in cities more often." }, { "URL": "bundle://gallery-03.jpg", "caption": { "text": "Steenbok typically lie low in vegetation cover at the first sign of threat.", "format": "html" } } ] } ] } ``` ## Related Documentation - **Adding an Image and Captions**: Create a photo that extends to both edges of the display, with captions that appear in the article layout and in full-screen view. - **Adding a Gallery of Images**: Display three images as a sequential gallery. - **Adding a Mosaic of Images**: Display five images as mosaic tiles. ## Images - **Image**: The component for displaying JPEG, WebP, PNG, or GIF images. - **Photo**: The component for including a photograph. - **Figure**: The component for including a figure. - **Portrait**: The component for including an image of a person. - **Logo**: The component for including a logo image. - **ReplicaAdvertisement**: The component for delivering digital versions of print advertisements.
